sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90982" key="prwtoklisi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρωτο-κλῐσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n90982.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">first seat at table,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ev.Matt.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23.6</biblScope></bibl>, etc.; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πρωτοκαθεδρία</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
